rclone upload to external domain

Alert: DLP PII_Bulk_Upload critical

=== RETRIEVED CONTEXT ===

MITRE:
T1041
Exfiltration Over C2 Channel

Definition:
Sensitive data sent to external destination.

Indicators:
DLP bulk upload; rclone/curl egress; large outbound transfers.

Recommendation:
Block egress; preserve logs; assess data exposure.

=== END ===
